token-mgr.seo.title: Quota Center
token-mgr.seo.desc: Track your AI token consumption across all tools. View balance, daily usage charts, and full transaction history in real time.
token-mgr.seo.keywords: AI token usage, token balance, API usage tracker, token consumption, token history
token-mgr.nav.name: Quota Center
token-mgr.nav.desc: Track your AI token consumption and balance
token-mgr.hero.title: Quota Center
token-mgr.hero.subtitle: Monitor your token balance, view daily usage trends, and track consumption across every AI tool.
token-mgr.balance.title: Current Balance
token-mgr.balance.low_warn: Your balance is running low. Only {n} tokens remaining.
token-mgr.balance.empty_warn: Token balance exhausted. AI tools are temporarily unavailable.
token-mgr.chart.empty: No usage data yet. Start using AI tools to see your stats.
token-mgr.history.title: Transaction History
token-mgr.history.empty: No transactions yet. Your history will appear here.
token-mgr.error.load_failed: Failed to load token data. Please refresh and try again.
token-mgr.error.insufficient: Insufficient token balance. Please contact support.
token-mgr.feature.1.title: Real-time Tracking
token-mgr.feature.1.desc: Every AI request is logged instantly. Your balance and history update in real time.
token-mgr.feature.2.title: Transparent Billing
token-mgr.feature.2.desc: See exactly how many prompt and completion tokens each request consumed, model by model.
token-mgr.feature.3.title: Free Starter Tokens
token-mgr.feature.3.desc: New accounts receive 2,000 free tokens — enough to explore all AI features without a credit card.
token-mgr.rules.1: New users get 2,000 free tokens upon registration
token-mgr.rules.2: AI tools consume tokens based on actual usage
token-mgr.rules.3: AI tools are paused when balance reaches zero
token-mgr.rules.4: Quota is only for AI features; other tools are completely free
